name: Veritate 85M (ReLU+L1 + MTP-2, FineWeb-Edu)
description: Byte-level decoder (vocab=256) at h=768 L=12 ffn=3072 heads=12. ReLU FFN with L1 sparsity loss on post-activation, 2-byte multi-token-prediction (MTP) head, byte0_projector contract method for cross-model decode. Trained from scratch on FineWeb-Edu sample-10BT (~5 GB byte-level .bin). bf16 autocast on CUDA, foreach AdamW, WSD schedule with sqrt decay last 10%, NaN-skip guard, bf16-native RMSNorm. Default 50000 steps (~1.2B tokens). Output: models/fineweb_edu_85m_bf16_v1_sparse/.
